instances.fragment:
.configs.recommended.rules,
      'indent': ['warn', 2],
      'linebreak-style': ['error', 'unix'],
      'quotes': ['warn', 'single', { avoidEscape: true }],
      'semi': ['warn', 'always'],
      'no-trailing-spaces': 'warn',
      'no-multiple-empty-lines': ['warn', { max: 1 }],
      'no-console': 'off',
      'no-process-exit': 'off',
      'no-empty': ['error', { allowEmptyCatch: true }],
      'no-unused-vars'
